name: Instagram Open All Albums
description: Opens Instagram, navigates to the content creation screen in Reel mode, opens the Recents dropdown, and selects All Albums to reveal the full album list.

steps.goal: Open Instagram. Tap on the Home icon on the bottom left. Tap the '+' icon at the top left of the screen to open the new post/reel creation screen. If you see a media gallery with tabs at the bottom (POST, REEL, STORY), tap the 'REEL' tab to switch to Reel mode.

You are on the Reel creation screen and can see a media gallery. At the very top of the gallery area there is a small dropdown button — it likely says 'Recents' with a small downward arrow or chevron. Tap that 'Recents' dropdown button. Do NOT scroll through the media grid or the feed. Only tap the dropdown label at the top of the gallery.

A dropdown or bottom sheet with album options is now visible. Find and tap the option labeled 'All albums' (or 'Other...' or 'Browse folders'). This should reveal the complete list of all photo/video albums on the device. Once you can see album names listed, mark done.
